title: Computercraft Greentech
description: Retro-futuristic textures and models for Computercraft
body:
# ComputerCraft Greentech
Changes textures found in [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) to a new retro-futuristic style, complete with new models.

![Banner image: a small workshop containing computers, wires, monitors, and other periphrials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca2c1614adf05bb2e87f14e79c1f279b380dd23f.png)

This pack contains a full retexture along with some replaced models of all computercraft assets.
Contains compatability with the [Shimmer](https://modrinth.com/mod/shimmer!) mod to add bloom to textures.

Basic computers and devices are now green, and advanced computers and monitiors magenta.

## Old V1.0 version
The resource pack was updated to a new retextured 2.0 version seen above, but the old v1.0 files are still avalible. The old banner for that version can be seen below:

![Banner image: a small workshop containing computers, wires, monitors, and other periphrials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16c65b3c76f3afe7385e5f298736c673a9f1a268_0.webp)
